induction_input: The cat the dog chased ran.
The book the student read disappeared.
The car the mechanic fixed started.
The idea the professor presented evolved.
The house the builder designed collapsed.
l2_sentences: The cat that was sleeping peacefully jumped suddenly.
The book which I borrowed yesterday needs to be returned.
The children who were playing outside ran home when it started to rain.
The car that was parked illegally got a ticket.
The woman who lives next door is a doctor.
